blended.narrative: Wolf Creek is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,143 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 6" over the past week. Current depth: 41".
